case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART VS. SAMANTHA Y JEFFERSON

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, SAMANTHA Y JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, SAMANTHA Y $5,122.68 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,122.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $380.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,485.58 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, SAMANTHA Y $2,859.80 PRINCIPAL, $127.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,987.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPART MENT SERVED DEC-18-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, SAMANTHA Y PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-23-2013 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
